summary: Add 4 corpus sources: Plato Symposium, Masnavi Book I, Eckhart Sermons, 1 Enoch
description:
Add four new public-domain texts to sources/manifest.toml to expand cross-tradition coverage:

1. Plato Symposium — Jowett 1871 (Scribner), https://sacred-texts.com/cla/plato/symposiu.htm, format=html, tradition=platonism (new). Single file ~127KB. The Diotima speech is direct ancestor of Plotinus I.6 (already in corpus) and Bruno's Eroici Furori.

2. Rumi Masnavi Book I — Whinfield 1898, https://sacred-texts.com/isl/masnavi/msn01.htm, format=html, tradition=sufism (new). Single file ~115KB. Whinfield is abridged — note this in source notes. Open question: is Nicholson Book I (1925) US-PD and a better choice? Defer to implementer.

3. Eckhart Sermons (Field) — Field 1909, https://ccel.org/ccel/eckhart/sermons.all.html, format=html, tradition=christian_mysticism (existing). 7 sermons, single page ~115KB. New source domain (CCEL). DEPENDS ON T2 (787681d2) — needs generic_html.py CCEL selector fix before extraction will work cleanly.

4. 1 Enoch (Charles 1917) — R.H. Charles, https://sacred-texts.com/bib/boe/index.htm, format=html_multi, tradition=jewish_mysticism (existing — sits with Zohar/merkabah material rather than coining a singleton 'second_temple_apocalyptic'). 113 files boe000.htm-boe112.htm, strictly contiguous. Charles preserves editorial brackets [[ ]] for Greek-only and [[[[ ]]]] for Ethiopic-only — consider whether chunker handles them or whether to preprocess.

Done contract: all 4 entries appended to manifest.toml, acquire.py run successfully for each, raw/<tradition>/<id>.txt + .meta.toml present for all 4. Verify Eckhart extraction has minimal navigation chrome (depends on T2).

resolution.note:
All 4 subtasks complete. Phase 1 corpus expansion shipped:
- Plato Symposium (Jowett 1871) — 117872 chars — new tradition 'platonism'
- Rumi Masnavi Book I (Whinfield 1898) — 100905 chars — new tradition 'sufism'  
- Eckhart Sermons (Field 1909, CCEL) — 67556 chars — extends 'christian_mysticism'
- 1 Enoch (Charles 1917, 115 parts) — 273282 chars — extends 'jewish_mysticism'

Total ~560KB new corpus material across 2 new + 2 existing tradition buckets.
